import io
import string

fn capitalize(_ word: String) -> String
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(word, 0)
  match b_opt
  when None
    word
  when Some(b)
    if b >= 97 and b <= 122
      let upper = string.from_byte(b - 32)
      let rest = string.substring(word, 1, string.len(word))
      "#{upper}#{rest}"
    else
      word
    end
  end
end

fn join_words(_ words: List<String>) -> String
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < words.len()
    let w = match words.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      ""
    end
    let capped = capitalize(w)
    if i == 0
      result = capped
    else
      result = "#{result} #{capped}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(l)
  l
when None
  ""
end
let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
println(join_words(words))
